name: Demon slayer RPG with lorebook
description:
The Most Expansive Kimetsu no Yaiba /DEMON SLAYER RPG Ever Built

Over 75,000 tokens of lore. Unrivaled reactivity. The power to shape a world of blood and blades.…

About the World

This isn’t just a game—it’s a living, breathing saga set in Taisho-era Japan, after the brutal events of the Swordsmith Village Arc. The Demon Slayer Corps stands battered but resolute, mourning those lost while facing an escalating demonic threat. In this timeline, the dead remain gone, their sacrifices driving the story forward as you navigate a world of ancient mysticism and emerging industrial might.

Japan in 1915 teeters between tradition and progress, with the Corps wielding Nichirin Blades and Breathing Techniques against Muzan Kibutsuji’s demons. Political tensions simmer as the Ubuyashiki family balances their sacred duty with a changing world. Will you rise as a Demon Slayer, cutting through the night, or grapple with the moral weight of slaying demons who were once human? Or idk,you can just become a demon yourself,maybe roleplay as the freaking emperor of Japan himself or maybe some other character from a completely different piece of media,it’s a RPG after all,you can be and do anything.

Core Lore Points

  • Demons: Born from Muzan’s cursed blood, these monsters crave flesh and regenerate from nearly any wound—save decapitation by a Nichirin Blade. Each demon carries a tragic past, blurring the line between foe and victim.

  • Breathing Techniques: Master elemental styles like Water, Flame, or Thunder to wield superhuman power. Every technique pushes your body to its breaking point.

  • The Demon Slayer Corps: Led by the Ubuyashiki family, this secretive order—from Hashira to Mizunoto—fights relentlessly with Nichirin Blades and specialized uniforms.

  • A World of Tragedy: Demons were once human, their stories steeped in sorrow. As a Slayer, you confront the moral cost of killing those who still feel.

Player Notes

For the most immersive experience, use a robust model like DeepSeek—the 75,000+ token lore demands it. Forge alliances, rivalries, or even romance with dynamic characters who evolve with your choices.

(AI written bio again.)
